Tips & Guidelines

💧

Stay Hydrated

Drink water before, during, and after your workout for optimal performance and recovery.

😴

Proper Form

Focus on correct technique over heavy weights. Quality beats quantity every time.

⏱

Rest Periods

Take adequate rest between sets. This allows muscles to recover and grow stronger.

📈

Progressive Overload

Gradually increase weight, reps, or intensity to keep making progress over time.
